_comment: Rune definitions (max level, unlock prereq, level→ldk), per-level tables (cost, stat, value), and the tree (edges/starts). Source: TBH wiki. Owned levels come from the save (game); costs/effects are wiki (not game-verified). Value UNITS are unverified — do NOT compute a power delta from v without anchoring the scale against a live modifier read first.
